Part.Source:
&IsAtualizaImpostos = false
For Each Order EmpCod, NfsCod Where EmpCod = &EmpCod Where NfsCod = &NfsCod
&SdtCadastroTabelaImpostoCbs.EmpCod = EmpCod &sdtCadastroTabelaImpostoCbs.TipSerCod = &WizardData.DadosNFSE.NfsTribNac &sdtCadastroTabelaImpostoCbs.CImpTbFilCod = NfsFilCod &sdtCadastroTabelaImpostoCbs.CImpLctCod = NfsLctCod &sdtCadastroTabelaImpostoCbs.CImpDtaIni = serverdate()
&NfsTipNF = NfsTipNF
if NfsTipNF <> 'S' NfsCNAE = &WizardData.DadosNFSE.NfsCNAE NfsCnaeSer = &WizardData.DadosNFSE.NfsCnaeSer NfsPerISS = &WizardData.DadosNFSE.CnaeItmTax Else if (NfsTribNac <> &WizardData.DadosNFSE.NfsTribNac ) &IsAtualizaImpostos = true EndIf
NfsTribNac = &WizardData.DadosNFSE.NfsTribNac //NfsTribMun NfsNbs = &WizardData.DadosNFSE.NfsNbs
NfsTotDesc = &WizardData.DadosNFSE.NfsTotDesc Endif
NfsDisSer = &WizardData.DadosNFSE.NfsDisSer
NfsInfComp = &WizardData.DadosNFSE.NfsInfComp
Exit EndFor
Commit
//grava um item if &NfsTipNF = 'S' For Each Order EmpCod, NfsCod, NfsItmCod Where EmpCod = &EmpCod Where NfsCod = &NfsCod Where NfsItmCod = 1
NfsItmValTot = &WizardData.DadosNFSE.NfsItmValTot
NfsItmEmbUnd = 'UN' NfsItmValUnt = &WizardData.DadosNFSE.NfsItmValTot NfsItmDesc = 0 //&WizardData.DadosNFSE.NfsTotDesc NfsItmQtd = 1 NfsItmProNom = &WizardData.DadosNFSE.NfsDisSer
NfsItmProCod = &WizardData.DadosNFSE.ProCod NfsItmProGraCod = &WizardData.DadosNFSE.ProGraCod
Exit When none
New //ADD ITEM EmpCod = &EmpCod NfsCod = &NfsCod NfsItmCod = 1
NfsItmProCod = &WizardData.DadosNFSE.ProCod NfsItmProGraCod = &WizardData.DadosNFSE.ProGraCod
NfsItmValTot = &WizardData.DadosNFSE.NfsItmValTot NfsItmDesc = 0 //&WizardData.DadosNFSE.NfsTotDesc NfsItmEmbUnd = 'UN' NfsItmValUnt = &WizardData.DadosNFSE.NfsItmValTot NfsItmQtd = 1 NfsItmProNom = &WizardData.DadosNFSE.NfsDisSer EndNew
EndFor
commit EndIf
//atualizaimpostos if &IsAtualizaImpostos = true prcRetornaConfiguracaoImpostoNFS_IBSCBS.Call(&SdtCadastroTabelaImpostoCbs)
if &sdtCadastroTabelaImpostoCbs.sts = 'S'
For Each Order EmpCod, NfsCod Where EmpCod = &EmpCod Where NfsCod = &NfsCod
NfsRetISSNov = &sdtCadastroTabelaImpostoCbs.TipSerIssqnRet NfsCstPisCofins = &sdtCadastroTabelaImpostoCbs.TipSerPisCofCst NfsPerCofins = &sdtCadastroTabelaImpostoCbs.TipSerCofTax NfsPerIR = &sdtCadastroTabelaImpostoCbs.TipSerIrrfTax NfsPerCPP = &sdtCadastroTabelaImpostoCbs.TipSerCpTax NfsPerPIS = &sdtCadastroTabelaImpostoCbs.TipSerPisTax NfsPerCSLL = &sdtCadastroTabelaImpostoCbs.TipSerCsllTax
NfsPerISS = &sdtCadastroTabelaImpostoCbs.TipSerIssqnTax NfsRetPisCofins = &sdtCadastroTabelaImpostoCbs.TipSerPisCofRet
NfsTribAprFed = &sdtCadastroTabelaImpostoCbs.TipSerPerFed NfsTribAprEst = &sdtCadastroTabelaImpostoCbs.TipSerPerEst NfsTribAprMun = &sdtCadastroTabelaImpostoCbs.TipSerPerMun
//NfsPerINSS
//NfsTotISS //NfsTotIR //NfsTotCPP //NfsTotCofins //NfsTotPIS //NfsTotINSS //NfsTotCSLL //NfsTotOut
//NfsRetCofins //NfsRetPisCofins //NfsRetIR //NfsRetCPP //NfsRetPIS //NfsRetINSS //NfsRetCSLL //NfsPerOut //NfsRetOut
Exit EndFor
Commit Else For Each Order EmpCod, NfsCod Where EmpCod = &EmpCod Where NfsCod = &NfsCod
NfsRetISSNov = TipoRetencaoIssqn.NaoRetido NfsCstPisCofins = PisCofinsServico.CST00 NfsPerCofins = 0 NfsPerIR = 0 NfsPerCPP = 0 NfsPerPIS = 0 NfsPerCSLL = 0
NfsPerISS = 0 NfsRetPisCofins = TipoRetencaoPisCofins.PisCofinsNaoRetido
NfsTribAprFed = 0 NfsTribAprEst = 0 NfsTribAprMun = 0 Exit EndFor
Commit Endif Endif
prcTotalizaNFSe.Call(&EmpCod, &NfsCod)
